description: Ranasinghe Arachchillage Sudharma Rathnaweera, Vs. Director General of Irrigation and Others Ranasinghe Arachchillage Sudharma Rathnaweera, Vs. Director General of Irrigation and Others View More before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: Ranasinghe Arachchillage Sudharma Rathnaweera, Vs. Director General of Irrigation and Others Ranasinghe Arachchillage Sudharma Rathnaweera, Vs. Director General of Irrigation and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
keywords: Can an objection be taken by the Respondent to an application made to Court by the competent authority under section 5(1) that the land is not State Land within the meaning of the State Land (Recovery of Possession) Act No. 07 of 1979(the Act)-Can an objection be raised on the competence of the Competent authority in the proceedings before a Magistrate in an application filed by the competent authority under section 5(1) of the Act-A challenge on the validity of the affidavit filed along with the application made to Court by the Respondent under section 5(1) of the Act- the fact that an affidavit does not state the religion of the affirmant, does not make the affidavit invalid.
legistation: Article 138, Article 154P(3)(b) and Article 154P(6) of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, State Land (Recovery of Possession) Act No. 07 1979 (as amended), Sections 3, 4, 5(1), 6, 7, 8, 9(1), 9(2) and 10.
